title: Table maintenance
excerpt: description: Learn how R2 Data Catalog automates table maintenance image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Table maintenance encompasses a set of operations that keep your Apache Iceberg tables performant and cost-efficient over time. As data is written, updated, and deleted, tables accumulate metadata and files that can degrade query performance over time. R2 Data Catalog automates two critical maintenance operations:
